Class UserService

java.lang.Object
service.UserService
public class UserService extends Object
Provides profile access and user search operations.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    UserService(SocialNetwork network, Session session)
    Creates a user service.

  • Constructor Details

    • UserService

      public UserService(SocialNetwork network, Session session)
      Creates a user service.
      Parameters:
      network - social network to query and update
      session - source of the current user ID

  • Method Details

    • getCurrentUser

      public User getCurrentUser()
      Returns the currently authenticated user.
      Returns:
      the current user, or null when logged out

    • updateCurrentUserProfile

      public boolean updateCurrentUserProfile(String name, String workplace, String hometown)
      Updates the current user's profile.
      Parameters:
      name - new display name
      workplace - new workplace
      hometown - new hometown
      Returns:
      true when a logged-in user was updated

    • getAllUsers

      public Collection<User> getAllUsers()
      Returns all registered users.
      Returns:
      a read-only collection of users

    • getUserById

      public User getUserById(String userId)
      Looks up a user by ID.
      Parameters:
      userId - user identifier
      Returns:
      matching user, or null when absent

    • searchUsers

      public Set<User> searchUsers(String searchType, String searchValue)
      Searches by user ID, name, workplace, or hometown. Search-type labels are case-insensitive; names are matched case-insensitively, while attribute searches use the network indexes.
      Parameters:
      searchType - one of User ID, Name, Workplace, or Hometown
      searchValue - value to match
      Returns:
      matching users, or an empty set for invalid input

    • findUsersByHometown

      public Set<User> findUsersByHometown(String hometown)
      Finds users by hometown.
      Parameters:
      hometown - hometown to search for
      Returns:
      matching users

    • findUsersByWorkplace

      public Set<User> findUsersByWorkplace(String workplace)
      Finds users by workplace.
      Parameters:
      workplace - workplace to search for
      Returns:
      matching users
